member.name: T:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent
member.summary: Base class for Ajax Control Toolkit extender components. Extenders attach behavior to a target control identified by . Full design pending — see Forge's architecture spec.

member.name: P:BlazorAjaxToolkitComponents.BaseExtenderComponent.TargetControlID
member.summary: The ID of the control this extender targets.
